function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: Invoice resend - INV-0002 (2025-12-02)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-02 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound write completed and final. Verification check: attachment path was previously read, single attachment so ordering is trivially newest-first, recipient matches Nina canonical email, and no quoting hazards present. Next required workflow step is deleting the processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with evidence and actions taken
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task fully executed: processed next inbox item, created outbound invoice resend draft, and removed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and acted on it. I verified the sender identity against Nina Schreiber’s canonical entity record, confirmed the requested 2025-12-02 Nordstern invoice exists, created an outbound email draft in the outbox with that invoice attached, and then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, used inbox and email workflows before acting, verified canonical sender via primary_contact_email, wrote outbound email record to outbox using runtime timestamp, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_OK is supported by canonical evidence: inbound sender `nina@finance-workflow.example` matched `primary_contact_email` in `/10_entities/cast/nina.md`; requested invoice date/counterparty matched `/50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md`; outbound record was created at `/60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md`; processed inbox item was then removed per workflow.
